excursions.description: Understand the ancient history by wandering through the medieval Old Town of Rhodes and take in the gorgeous views from atop the island’s highest point.

excursions.title: Accessible Ephesus & Temple of Artemis
excursions.description: Accessible tour of ancient Ephesus for guests with limited mobility. Explore ruins, visit Virgin Mary's house, and witness historical wonders.

excursions.title: Accessible Acropolis To Olympic Glory
excursions.description: Delve into Greece’s ancient past at the Acropolis Museum and explore a somewhat more contemporary side of Athens at attractions such as the stadium.

excursions.title: Accessible Ephesus & Temple of Artemis - Mobility Equipment User
excursions.description: Accessible tour for guests dependent on mobility devices. Explore ancient Ephesus with step-free routes, adapted vehicles, and historical wonders.

excursions.title: Accessible Acropolis To Olympic Glory - Mobility Equipment User
excursions.description: Delve into Greece’s ancient past at the Acropolis Museum and explore a somewhat more contemporary side of Athens at attractions such as the stadium.

excursions.title: Dolphin Watching With Marine Experts
excursions.description: Cruise into the Bay of Kotor with a marine researcher whose area of expertise is dolphins, which are abundant in these waters.

excursions.title: Live A Day Like A Kotor Fisherman
excursions.description: Spend hours fishing on the Bay of Kotor and then dine on your fresh catch at a coastal restaurant. Everything needed will be supplied, including the bait, tack

excursions.title: Underwater Wine Experience - Small Group Experience
excursions.description: Zip through the sheltered waters of the Bay of Kotor in a speedboat and enjoy a sampling of wines aged beneath the sea, which imparts a unique flavor and arom
